root_text.an4.258:1.1: “Yāni kānici, bhikkhave, kulāni bhogesu mahattaṁ pattāni na ciraṭṭhitikāni bhavanti, sabbāni tāni catūhi ṭhānehi, etesaṁ vā aññatarena.
root_text.an4.258:1.3: Naṭṭhaṁ na gavesanti, jiṇṇaṁ na paṭisaṅkharonti, aparimitapānabhojanā honti, dussīlaṁ itthiṁ vā purisaṁ vā ādhipacce ṭhapenti.
root_text.an4.258:1.4: Yāni kānici, bhikkhave, kulāni bhogesu mahattaṁ pattāni na ciraṭṭhitikāni bhavanti, sabbāni tāni imehi catūhi ṭhānehi, etesaṁ vā aññatarena.
root_text.an4.258:2.1: Yāni kānici, bhikkhave, kulāni bhogesu mahattaṁ pattāni ciraṭṭhitikāni bhavanti, sabbāni tāni catūhi ṭhānehi, etesaṁ vā aññatarena.
root_text.an4.258:2.3: Naṭṭhaṁ gavesanti, jiṇṇaṁ paṭisaṅkharonti, parimitapānabhojanā honti, sīlavantaṁ itthiṁ vā purisaṁ vā ādhipacce ṭhapenti.
root_text.an4.258:2.4: Yāni kānici, bhikkhave, kulāni bhogesu mahattaṁ pattāni ciraṭṭhitikāni bhavanti, sabbāni tāni imehi catūhi ṭhānehi, etesaṁ vā aññatarenā”ti.

translation_text.an4.258:1.1: “Mendicants, when families don’t stay wealthy for long, it’s always for one or more of these four reasons.
translation_text.an4.258:1.3: They don’t look for what’s lost; they don’t repair old things; they eat and drink too much; or they put an unethical woman or man in charge.
translation_text.an4.258:1.4: When families don’t stay wealthy for long, it’s always for one or more of these four reasons.
translation_text.an4.258:2.1: When families do stay wealthy for long, it’s always for one or more of these four reasons.
translation_text.an4.258:2.3: They look for what’s lost; they repair old things; they eat and drink in moderation; and they put an ethical woman or man in charge.
translation_text.an4.258:2.4: When families do stay wealthy for long, it’s always for one or more of these four reasons.”
